description: Multi-turn: send a message to agent -> view conversation history (covers `neomind agent conversation` + `agent send-message`; CLI chat session path, previously 0 coverage).

turns.user: Send a message to demo-agent: 'Any anomalies today?'
Can I see demo-agent's recent conversation history?

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent resolves demo-agent's id then runs `neomind agent send-message <id> 'Any anomalies today?'` (or conversation subcommand)
Turn 2: Agent runs `neomind agent conversation <id>` (or GET /api/agents/<id>/conversation) to view history
expectations.overall: Turn 1 must actually trigger message dispatch (not the chat-path memory tool)
